payload.title: Agent skills — make any agent fluent in Trust
payload.description: Package what agents need to work with Trust into reusable, distributable skills — so an agent landing in any Trust project (or asked to start one) authors strict code correctly on the first try instead of rediscovering the dialect from error messages. Builds on the assets that already exist: docs/WRITING-TRUST.md (the autogenerated agent guide, RT-78), the teaching-error contract (docs/AGENTS.md), JSON diagnostics (RT-70), trust explain/fix, and the RT-64 action-stream work. The eval is the north star: a skill-equipped agent should beat the bare-prompt 0% ship rate on setup friction too — zero wrong-activation attempts, zero env-var archaeology.
